visa_types.name: Business

Documents to be submitted with a visa application form- Click Here
Note - Please be informed that in case applicant is having travel history in old passports than that needs to be submit along with the applications.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:  Business ]
Service charge:

[Table:  Business ]
*Please note that all the service fee is inclusive of Goods and Service Tax – (SGST @9% and CGST@9%
Applicants applying at the Lebanon Visa Application Centre shall  be levied a convenience charge of INR 150/-
Visa Fee and VFS Service Fee can be made in Cash/Card/UPI.
visa_types.processing_time: Decisions about Lebanon visa applications submitted in Delhi will be minimum 5-7 working days and for Other locations will be minimum 11-12 working days. In some cases applications will require further enquiry.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
A  Business Visa is given those who are doing business in Lebanon such as making  sales or establishing contacts on behalf of a company outside India
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A  Business Visa is given those who are doing business in Lebanon such as making  sales or establishing contacts on behalf of a company outside India

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Business ]
Service charge:

[Table:  Business ]
*Please note that all the service fee is inclusive of Goods and Service Tax – (SGST @9% and CGST@9%
Applicants applying at the Lebanon Visa Application Centre shall  be levied a convenience charge of INR 150/-
Visa Fee and VFS Service Fee can be made in Cash/Card/UPI.

## Documents Required

Documents to be submitted with a visa application form- Click Here
Note - Please be informed that in case applicant is having travel history in old passports than that needs to be submit along with the applications.

## Photo Specifications

[Table:  Business ]

[Table:  Business ]

[Table:  Business ]

[Table:  Business ]

## Processing Time
Decisions about Lebanon visa applications submitted in Delhi will be minimum 5-7 working days and for Other locations will be minimum 11-12 working days. In some cases applications will require further enquiry.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Airport Transit Visa application is applicable in case you have to change flights without leaving the airport. An airport transit visa entitles the holder to enter the international transit area of the airport, but not the territory of the Lebanon
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Airport Transit Visa application is applicable in case you have to change flights without leaving the airport. An airport transit visa entitles the holder to enter the international transit area of the airport, but not the territory of the Lebanon

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Transit]

[Table:  Transit]
*Please note that all the service fee is inclusive of Goods and Service Tax – (SGST @9% and CGST@9%

Visa Fee and VFS Service Fee can be made in Cash/Card/UPI.

Note - Please be informed that in case applicant is having travel history in old passports than that needs to be submit along with the applications.
